fix_summary: scripts/dosage_normalizer.py:639-665 joins ingredient["forms"][*].name into the ingredient_name passed to unit_converter.convert_nutrient(). unit_converter form-detection now sees β-carotene / retinyl palmitate tokens and routes to vitamin_a_beta_carotene_supplement (factor 0.1) or vitamin_a_retinol (factor 0.3) instead of vitamin_a_unknown (factor 1.0).
verification_pipeline: 1. Re-enriched GNC (3945 products) + Garden_of_life (1131 products) — 50 minutes
3. Rebuilt final DB to /tmp/pharmaguide_release_build_v3 (combining re-enriched GNC+GoL with 19 other brands existing artifacts)
6. Ran test_label_fidelity_contract.py against v3 build (6/7 pass)

1007.pregnancy_ul_check: 500 mcg RAE ≤ 3000 mcg RAE UL — safe (now evaluable)

43994.product: Garden of Life Perfect Food Raw Apple

tests_passing.test_label_fidelity_contract.py: 6/7 pass (plant_part_preserved still fails on blend parents — pre-existing, not Vitamin A related)

remaining_corpus_coverage_caveat: 1122 products across 16 brands have Vitamin A in IU. This verification re-enriched only GNC (1007) + Garden_of_life (43994) — the canary set. Other 14 brands' on-disk enriched artifacts still carry the pre-fix normalized_unit=IU. The Python code is fixed; full corpus propagation requires re-enriching all 16 brands (estimated 2-3 hours sequential, 30-60 minutes parallel). Suggested follow-up: `python3 scripts/run_pipeline.py` or per-brand re-enrich for the affected 14.
